text: I feel like I am drifting through a threshold between spaces dedicated to ideas and those waiting for meaning. The minimalist design of a quiet room beckons contemplation, while the vivid and informative wall, speaking of research and development, draws my mind into the world of innovation. I am present yet restless, sensing the possibility of new knowledge just around the corner. The environment poses questions before I even ask them, and I am both observer and participant in this unfolding curiosity.
